text: 🇮🇷 Latest footage of the situation of ships in the Strait of Hormuz. “They are waiting for permission from the Islamic Republic of Iran to pass through the strait” — Fars News Agency.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 霍尔木兹海峡船只状况的最新画面。“他们正在等待伊朗伊斯兰共和国的通行许可”——法尔斯通讯社。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump said Iran promised to open the Strait of Hormuz but knowingly failed to do so, adding that they may have laid mines in the water. He warned that “every law in the book is being violated” and that Iran must begin the process of…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Axios: A U.S. clarified that the U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz is another bargaining tactic aimed and removing one form of leverage Iran has. "We want to take this card from the Iranians.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，伊朗承诺开放霍尔木兹海峡，但却故意食言，并补充说他们可能在水中布设了水雷。他警告称‘书中的每一条法律都在被践踏’，伊朗必须开始……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Axios：一位美国官员澄清说，美国对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁是另一种旨在消除伊朗筹码的谈判策略。“我们想从伊朗人手中拿走这张牌。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱 Trump announces US naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz “effective immediately”." 🇮🇷 Iranian drones monitor Strait of Hormuz traffic. “Any wrong movement will trap enemy in deadly whirlpools in the Strait” — IRGC Navy.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench mirror：“🇮🇷⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱 特朗普宣布美国海军对霍尔木兹海峡实施‘立即生效’的封锁。” 🇮🇷 伊朗无人机监控霍尔木兹海峡的交通。“任何错误的举动都会让敌人陷入海峡的致命漩涡中”——伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军。

text: 🇮🇷 Wall Street Journal reports Iran retained a significant portion of its nuclear capability after US and Israeli strikes, strengthening its position in talks. Despite damage to several facilities, Tehran is believed to still have centrifuges and underground infrastructure capable of continuing uranium enrichment. A key factor is an estimated stockpile of about 450 kg of near weapons-grade enriched uranium, some of which, according to the IAEA, is stored in tunnels beneath the Isfahan site. The strikes hit research centers, yellowcake production infrastructure, and other nuclear-linked facilities, but did not fully dismantle the program. Some deeply buried sites, including parts of Natanz, may remain beyond the reach of even advanced US bunker-busting weapons. Analysts say this leaves Iran with additional leverage in negotiations with Washington, especially given its strategic position near the Strait of Hormuz. The US continues to demand a complete halt to uranium enrichment, while Iran maintains its program is for civilian purposes. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 《华尔街日报》报道称，伊朗在美国和以色列的打击后保留了大部分核能力，从而加强了其在谈判中的地位。尽管多个设施受损，但据信德黑兰仍拥有能够继续进行铀浓缩的离心机和地下基础设施。一个关键因素是估计约 450 公斤的近武器级浓缩铀库存，据国际原子能机构称，其中一些储存在伊斯法罕基地下方的隧道中。打击行动击中了研究中心、黄饼生产基础设施和其他与核相关的设施，但并未完全拆除该计划。一些深埋的地点，包括纳坦兹的部分地区，可能即使是先进的美国钻地弹也无法触及。分析人士称，这使伊朗在与华盛顿的谈判中拥有了额外的筹码，特别是在其靠近霍尔木兹海峡的战略位置方面。美国继续要求彻底停止铀浓缩，而伊朗则坚持其计划用于民用目的。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Semi-official Iranian media Mehr News has released Iranian surveillance drone footage of the Strait of Hormuz. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗半官方媒体梅尔通讯社发布了伊朗监视无人机拍摄的霍尔木兹海峡画面。@wfwitness

text: 📸 USAF KC-135R Stratotanker damaged by an Iranian missile strike in Saudi Arabia was flown to the UK for repairs before heading to the U.S. Patches spotted at nearly every part of the aircraft. Source: Mark Lynham/Facebook
text_zh: 📸 一架在沙特阿拉伯被伊朗导弹袭击损坏的美国空军 KC-135R 空中加油机，在前往美国之前被飞往英国进行维修。在飞机的几乎每个部位都发现了补丁。来源：Mark Lynham/Facebook

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Two empty crude tankers attempted to make their way through the Strait of Hormuz and into the Persian Gulf on Sunday, only to make last-minute U-turns just as peace negotiations between the US and Iran broke down. The tankers, Agios Fanourios I and Shalamar, turned back near Iran’s Larak island, while a third tanker, Mombasa B, successfully made its way between Larak and Qeshm islands into the Persian Gulf.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 周日，两艘空载原油油轮试图穿过霍尔木兹海峡进入波斯湾，但就在美伊和平谈判破裂时，它们在最后一刻掉头。Agios Fanourios I 号和 Shalamar 号油轮在伊朗拉拉克岛附近折返，而第三艘油轮 Mombasa B 号则成功穿过拉拉克岛和格什姆岛之间进入波斯湾。

text: 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Israeli Channel 14 : “Israel will not return to fighting Iran alone.”
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 以色列第 14 频道：“以色列不会独自回到与伊朗的战斗中。”

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇵🇰 Both the US and Iranian delegations have left Islamabad in the immediate aftermath of the failed talks. The U.S. delegation’s government aircraft (N471US) departed overnight and has now landed in Paris. Neither side wanted to stay another day…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 IRNA: The high-ranking Iranian delegation, headed by Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf and Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi, left Islamabad for Tehran hours ago. Pakistani officials, including the deputy prime minister, National Assembly speaker, army chief, and interior minister, saw them off. Their departure confirms our earlier report that the delegation left in the morning, hours after the failed talks. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇵🇰 在谈判失败后，美国和伊朗代表团都已离开伊斯兰堡。美国代表团的政府飞机 (N471US) 于夜间起飞，现已降落在巴黎。双方都不想再多待一天……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 伊朗伊斯兰共和国通讯社：由议会议长穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫和外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希率领的高级别伊朗代表团已于数小时前离开伊斯兰堡返回德黑兰。巴基斯坦官员，包括副总理、国民议会议长、陆军参谋长和内政部长为他们送行。他们的离开证实了我们早先的报道，即代表团在谈判失败数小时后的早晨离开。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Oman’s Foreign Minister Badr Albusaidi urges extending the ceasefire and continuing negotiations, saying “success may require everyone to make painful concessions.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043322997759426995/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 阿曼外交大臣巴德尔·布赛义迪敦促延长停火并继续谈判，称“成功可能需要每个人做出痛苦的让步。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043322997759426995/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel VERY SIGNIFICANT 🔴 If President Trump moves forward with a Strait of Hormuz blockade, Iranian tankers, including all shadow fleet vessels loading at Kharg Island, may now face U.S. naval interception, seizure. This will hit the regimes pocket. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043322467054219780/photo/1 BREAKING 🔴 🔴 Trump: Our navy will now block any ship trying to enter or leave the Strait of Hormuz. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 非常重要 🔴 如果特朗普总统推进霍尔木兹海峡封锁，包括所有在哈尔克岛装载的影子船队船只在内的伊朗油轮，现在可能面临美国海军的拦截和扣押。这将打击该政权的钱袋子。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043322467054219780/photo/1 突发 🔴 🔴 特朗普：我们的海军现在将封锁任何试图进入或离开霍尔木兹海峡的船只。- 开源情报推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 BREAKING | Donald Trump announced a full naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz following the collapse of negotiations with Iran. 📌 “Iran promised to open the Strait of Hormuz but deliberately failed to do so, causing anxiety, disruption, and harm worldwide. They claim to have laid mines in the water, and even the possibility is enough to deter shipowners. This has severely damaged Iran’s reputation, and they must immediately begin reopening this international waterway.” 📌 “Vice President J.D. Vance, Special Envoy Steve Witkoff, and Jared Kushner fully briefed me on the Islamabad talks, held under the leadership of Pakistan’s Army Chief Asim Munir and Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif.” 📌 “The meeting with Iran lasted nearly 20 hours. While progress was made on some points, the core issue remains — Iran is unwilling to abandon its nuclear ambitions.” 📌 “Despite respectful engagement with Iranian representatives, they remained uncompromising on the most critical issue. As I have always said: Iran will never have a nuclear weapon.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231：🇺🇸 🇮🇷 突发 | 唐纳德·特朗普在与伊朗的谈判破裂后宣布对霍尔木兹海峡实施全面海军封锁。📌 “伊朗承诺开放霍尔木兹海峡，但故意食言，导致全球范围内的焦虑、混乱和伤害。他们声称在水中布设了水雷，即使这种可能性也足以威慑船东。这严重损害了伊朗的声誉，他们必须立即开始重新开放这条国际水道。” 📌 “副总统 J.D. 万斯、特使史蒂夫·威特科夫和贾里德·库什纳向我全面通报了在巴基斯坦陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔和总理夏巴兹·谢里夫领导下举行的伊斯兰堡会谈。” 📌 “与伊朗的会晤持续了近 20 个小时。虽然在某些点上取得了进展，但核心问题依然存在——伊朗不愿放弃其核野心。” 📌 “尽管与伊朗代表进行了尊重的接触，但他们在最关键的问题上仍然毫不妥协。正如我一直所说：伊朗永远不会拥有核武器。” 与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Trump, in a series of posts this morning, says that the US Navy will blockade "any and all Ships trying to enter, or leave, the Strait of Hormuz." Trump adds that the Navy will interdict any vessel that has paid a toll to Iran. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2043320537741459730/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 特朗普今天早上在一系列帖子中表示，美国海军将封锁“任何和所有试图进入或离开霍尔木兹海峡的船只”。特朗普补充说，海军将拦截任何向伊朗支付过通行费的船只。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2043320537741459730/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Sounds like round 2 is about to happen Trump: “Additionally and, at an appropriate moment, we are fully "LOCKED AND LOADED," and our Military will finish up the little that is left of Iran! President DONALD J. TRUMP” BREAKING 🔴 🔴 Trump: Our navy will now block any ship trying to enter or leave the Strait of Hormuz. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 听起来第二轮即将发生 特朗普：“此外，在适当的时候，我们已经完全‘锁定并装弹’，我们的军队将完成伊朗剩下的一点点！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统” 突发 🔴 🔴 特朗普：我们的海军现在将封锁任何试图进入或离开霍尔木兹海峡的船只。- 开源情报推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) This Trump's Strait of Hormuz blockade announcement: https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2043319722884677918/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 这是特朗普关于霍尔木兹海峡封锁的声明：https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2043319722884677918/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender In an extremely notable announcement, U.S. President Donald J. Trump has said that U.S. naval vessels will begin the process of blockading the Strait of Hormuz and that any vessel that pays a toll to Iran for transit will be interdicted by the U.S. Navy. Additionally, President Trump was extremely critical of the Iranian negotiators as well. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在一份极其引人注目的声明中，美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普表示，美国海军舰艇将开始封锁霍尔木兹海峡的过程，任何向伊朗支付过通行费的船只都将被美国海军拦截。此外，特朗普总统对伊朗谈判代表也提出了严厉批评。推文

text: Open Source Intel Something to watch: China BREAKING 🔴 🔴 Trump: Our navy will now block any ship trying to enter or leave the Strait of Hormuz. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 需要关注的事情：中国 突发 🔴 🔴 特朗普：我们的海军现在将封锁任何试图进入或离开霍尔木兹海峡的船只。- 开源情报推文

text: WarTranslated Trump hadn't finished unblocking the Strait of Hormuz before announcing his own blockade of it. Interesting plan. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043318346498691274/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 特朗普还没完成对霍尔木兹海峡的解封，就宣布了对他自己的封锁。有趣的计划。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043318346498691274/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: "The United States of America, will never be extorted. I have also instructed our Navy to seek and interdict every vessel in International Waters that has paid a toll to Iran. No one who pays an illegal toll will have safe passage on the high seas." Very significant. BREAKING 🔴 🔴 Trump: Our navy will now block any ship trying to enter or leave the Strait of Hormuz. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普：“美利坚合众国永远不会被勒索。我还指示我们的海军搜寻并拦截每一艘在国际水域向伊朗支付过通行费的船只。任何支付非法通行费的人都不会在公海上有安全通道。” 非常重要。突发 🔴 🔴 特朗普：我们的海军现在将封锁任何试图进入或离开霍尔木兹海峡的船只。- 开源情报推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : According to BILD, after failed U.S.–Iran talks in Pakistan, J.D. Vance made a brief stop at Ramstein Air Base while returning to the United States. ▪️ The stop was unplanned and occurred during his flight back. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043316959681434110/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231：据《图片报》报道，在美伊巴基斯坦会谈失败后，J.D. 万斯在返回美国途中在拉姆施泰因空军基地短暂停留。▪️ 这次停留是计划外的，发生在他飞回的途中。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043316959681434110/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 UKMTO says it received a report of an incident 54 nm southwest of Yemen’s Hodeidah. The crew of a skiff requested a sailing vessel stop, and when the master refused, they attempted to come alongside and board. The skiff later turned away after the master deployed a flare. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 新消息 🔴 UKMTO 表示收到也门荷台达西南 54 海里处发生事故的报告。一艘小艇的船员要求一艘帆船停船，当船长拒绝时，他们试图靠近并登船。船长发射信号弹后，小艇随后掉头离开。推文

text: Open Source Intel FULL PRESIDENT TRUMP STATEMENT AFTER IRAN TALKS FAIL 🔴 Trump: "Iran promised to open the Strait of Hormuz, and they knowingly failed to do so. This caused anxiety, dislocation, and pain to many people and Countries throughout the World. They say they put mines in the water, even though all of their Navy, and most of their “mine droppers,” have been completely blown up. They may have done so, but what ship owner would want to take the chance? There is great dishonor and permanent harm to the reputation of Iran, and what’s left of their “Leaders,” but we are beyond all of that. As they promised, they better begin the process of getting this INTERNATIONAL WATERWAY OPEN AND FAST! Every Law in the book is being violated by them. I have been fully debriefed by Vice President JD Vance, Special Envoy Steve Witkoff, and Jared Kushner, on the meeting that took place in Islamabad through the kind and very competent leadership of Field Marshal Asim Munir, and Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif, of Pakistan. They are very extraordinary men, and continuously thank me for saving 30 to 50 million lives in what would have been a horrendous War with India. I always appreciate hearing that — The amount of Humanity spoken of is incomprehensible. The meeting with Iran began early in the morning, and lasted throughout the night — Close to 20 hours. I could go into great detail, and talk about much that has been gotten but, there is only one thing that matters — IRAN IS UNWILLING TO GIVE UP ITS NUCLEAR AMBITIONS! In many ways, the points that were agreed to are better than us continuing our Military Operations to conclusion, but all of those points don’t matter compared to allowing Nuclear Power to be in the hands of such volatile, difficult, unpredictable people. My three Representatives, as all of this time went by, became, not surprisingly, very friendly and respectful of Iran’s Representatives, Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf, Abbas Araghchi, and Ali Bagheri, but that doesn’t matter because they were very unyielding as to the single most important issue and, as I have always said, right from the beginning, and many years ago, IRAN WILL NEVER HAVE A NUCLEAR WEAPON! Donald J. Trump" BREAKING 🔴 🔴 Trump: Our navy will now block any ship trying to enter or leave the Strait of Hormuz. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗会谈失败后特朗普总统的完整声明 🔴 特朗普：“伊朗承诺开放霍尔木兹海峡，但他们故意食言。这给世界各地的许多人和国家带来了焦虑、混乱和痛苦。他们说他们在水中布设了水雷，尽管他们所有的海军和大多数‘布雷器’都已被彻底炸毁。他们可能确实这样做了，但哪个船东愿意冒险？伊朗及其剩下的‘领导人’名誉扫地，受到永久性伤害，但我们已经超越了这一切。正如他们所承诺的那样，他们最好开始让这条国际水道快速开放的过程！他们正在践踏书中的每一条法律。副总统 JD 万斯、特使史蒂夫·威特科夫和贾里德·库什纳已向我全面通报了在巴基斯坦陆军元帅阿西姆·穆尼尔和总理夏巴兹·谢里夫的仁慈和非常有能力的领导下在伊斯兰堡举行的会议。他们是非常非凡的人，并不断感谢我挽救了 3000 万到 5000 万人的生命，否则那将是一场与印度的可怕战争。我总是很感激听到这些——所谈论的人性数量是不可理解的。与伊朗的会晤在清晨开始，并持续了一整夜——接近 20 个小时。我可以详细说明，谈论很多已经得到的东西，但只有一件事很重要——伊朗不愿放弃其核野心！在许多方面，达成的点比我们继续军事行动直到结束要好，但与让核力量掌握在如此反复无常、困难、不可预测的人手中相比，所有这些点都不重要。我的三位代表，随着时间的推移，毫不奇怪，变得非常友好并尊重伊朗的代表穆罕默德-巴盖尔·卡利巴夫、阿巴斯·阿拉格希和阿里·巴盖里，但这并不重要，因为他们在最重要的问题上非常不妥协，而且正如我一直所说，从一开始，多年前，伊朗永远不会拥有核武器！唐纳德·J·特朗普” 突发 🔴 🔴 特朗普：我们的海军现在将封锁任何试图进入或离开霍尔木兹海峡的船只。- 开源情报推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) #BREAKING : US President Trump announces the U.S. Navy was ordered to begin the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz immediately. This follows talks with the Iranians in Pakistan during which, according to Trump, Washington and Tehran failed to reach an agreement on the nuclear issue. The US president has also instructed the navy to seek and interdict every vessel in international waters that has paid a toll to Iran. tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) #突发：美国总统特朗普宣布下令美国海军立即开始封锁霍尔木兹海峡。此前，他在巴基斯坦与伊朗人进行了会谈，据特朗普称，华盛顿和德黑兰未能就核问题达成协议。美国总统还指示海军搜寻并拦截每一艘在国际水域向伊朗支付过通行费的船只。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇴🇲🇺🇸🇮🇷 Oman’s foreign minister Badr Albusaidi urged that the ceasefire be extended and talks continue. “When I met Vice President Vance just hours before the war began, I formed an impression that both he and the President had a genuine and strong preference…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump said Iran promised to open the Strait of Hormuz but knowingly failed to do so, adding that they may have laid mines in the water. He warned that “every law in the book is being violated” and that Iran must begin the process of opening the international waterway “open and fast”. Trump was briefed by Vice President Vance, Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner on the 20‑hour talks in Islamabad. He said most points were agreed, but “there is only one thing that matters – Iran is unwilling to give up its nuclear ambitions." He reiterated: “Iran will never have a nuclear weapon.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇴🇲🇺🇸🇮🇷 阿曼外交大臣巴德尔·布赛义迪敦促延长停火并继续谈判。‘当我在战争开始前几个小时会见万斯副总统时，我形成了一种印象，即他和总统都有一个真实而强烈的偏好……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，伊朗承诺开放霍尔木兹海峡，但故意食言，并补充说他们可能在水中布设了水雷。他警告称“书中的每一条法律都在被践踏”，伊朗必须开始“快速开放”这条国际水道的过程。特朗普听取了副总统万斯、史蒂夫·威特科夫和贾里德·库什纳关于伊斯兰堡 20 小时会谈的简报。他说大多数点都达成了共识，但“只有一件事很重要——伊朗不愿放弃其核野心。” 他重申：“伊朗永远不会拥有核武器。” @wfwitness

text: 🇭🇺 Massive turnout in the Hungarian parliamentary election, with about 66% of voters having cast their ballots by 3 p.m. local time. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 匈牙利议会选举投票率很高，截至当地时间下午 3 点，约 66% 的选民投了票。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 The head of Iran's Forensic Medicine Organization said that during the US/Israel imposed war on Iran, the bodies of 3,375 people were identified and their identities confirmed by the Forensic Medicine Organization, of which 2,875 were men and 496 were women.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 伊朗法医组织负责人表示，在美国/以色列对伊朗发动的战争期间，法医组织确认并核实了 3375 人的遗体身份，其中 2875 人为男性，496 人为女性。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "Basically, Trump is now blockading the strait himself. Markets will be fun to watch." ⚡️ 🇴🇲 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Oman’s foreign minister Badr Albusaidi urged that the ceasefire be extended and talks continue. “When I met Vice President Vance just hours before the war began, I formed an impression that both he and the President had a genuine and strong preference to avoid the entanglements of war,” he wrote. “Success may require everyone to make painful concessions, but this is nothing as compared to the pain of failure and war.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“基本上，特朗普现在亲自封锁了海峡。市场将会很有看头。” ⚡️ 🇴🇲 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 阿曼外交大臣巴德尔·布赛义迪敦促延长停火并继续谈判。“当我在战争开始前几个小时会见万斯副总统时，我形成了一种印象，即他和总统都有一个真实而强烈的偏好，即避免战争的纠葛，”他写道。“成功可能需要每个人做出痛苦的让步，但这与失败和战争的痛苦相比算不了什么。” @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ BBC: You had Nick Fuentes on your show who said Hitler was cool... Tucker Carlson: I've interviewed Ted Cruz and tried to interview Randy Fine—he wouldn't. Both of them have defended the genocide in Gaza, the murder of children. I would say that sending money to a military that murders children is a little bit more significant a moral crime than saying ugly things.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ BBC：你的节目里有尼克·富恩特斯，他说希特勒很酷…… 塔克·卡尔森：我采访过泰德·克鲁兹，并试图采访兰迪·法恩——但他拒绝了。他们两人都为加沙的种族灭绝、杀害儿童的行为进行了辩护。我会说，向一个杀害儿童的军队输送资金，比说一些难听的话在道德上更严重。

text: ⚡️ 🇾🇪 UKMTO reports an incident 54 nautical miles southwest of Al Hudaydah, Yemen where a sailing vessel was approached by a skiff carrying 10 to 12 individuals, several armed with automatic weapons. The individuals attempted to force the vessel to stop and board, but the crew deployed a flare, causing the skiff to withdraw and depart the area. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇾🇪 UKMTO 报告称，在也门荷台达西南 54 海里处发生了一起事件，一艘帆船被一艘载有 10 到 12 人的小艇靠近，其中几人携带自动武器。这些人试图强迫船只停船并登船，但船员发射了信号弹，导致小艇撤退并离开该地区。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Trump: Iran promised to open the Strait of Hormuz, and they knowingly failed to do so. This caused anxiety, dislocation, and pain to many people and Countries throughout the World. They say they put mines in the water, even though all of their Navy, and most of their "mine droppers," have been completely blown up. They may have done so, but what ship owner would want to take the chance? There is great dishonor and permanent harm to the reputation of Iran, and what's left of their "Leaders," but we are beyond all of that. As they promised, they better begin the process of getting this INTERNATIONAL WATERWAY OPEN AND FAST! Every Law in the book is being violated by them. I have been fully debriefed by Vice President JD Vance, Special Envoy Steve Witkoff, and Jared Kushner, on the meeting that took place in Islamabad through the kind and very competent leadership of Field Marshal Asim Munir, and Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif, of Pakistan. They are very extraordinary men, and continuously thank me for saving 30 to 50 million lives in what would have been a horrendous War with India. I always appreciate hearing that — The amount of Humanity spoken of is incomprehensible. The meeting with Iran began early in the morning, and lasted throughout the night - Close to 20 hours. I could go into great detail, and talk about much that has been gotten but, there is only one thing that matters - IRAN IS UNWILLING TO GIVE UP ITS NUCLEAR AMBITIONS! In many ways, the points that were agreed to are better than us continuing our Military Operations to conclusion, but all of those points don't matter compared to allowing Nuclear Power to be in the hands of such volatile, difficult, unpredictable people. My three Representatives, as all of this time went by, became, not surprisingly, very friendly and respectful of Iran's Representatives, Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf, Abbas Aragchi, and Ali Bagheri, but that doesn't matter because they were very unyielding as to the single most important issue and, as I have always said, right from the beginning, and many years ago, IRAN WILL NEVER HAVE A NUCLEAR WEAPON!
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 特朗普：伊朗承诺开放霍尔木兹海峡，但他们故意食言。这给世界各地的许多人和国家带来了焦虑、混乱和痛苦。他们说他们在水中布设了水雷，尽管他们所有的海军和大多数“布雷器”都已被彻底炸毁。他们可能确实这样做了，但哪个船东愿意冒险？伊朗及其剩下的“领导人”名誉扫地，受到永久性伤害，但我们已经超越了这一切。正如他们所承诺的那样，他们最好开始让这条国际水道快速开放的过程！他们正在践踏书中的每一条法律。伊朗不愿放弃其核野心！伊朗永远不会拥有核武器！

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷 Following the collapse of US‑Iran talks, the Israeli Chief of Staff has placed the Israeli military on immediate readiness for a return to war with Iran. The Intelligence Directorate is accelerating target building. No decision on military action…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu will convene a limited security cabinet this evening. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷 在美伊会谈破裂后，以色列参谋长已将以色列军队置于立即准备状态，以恢复与伊朗的战争。情报局正在加速目标建设。尚未决定军事行动……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡将于今晚召开有限安全内阁会议。@wfwitness

text: UKMTO reports an incident 54 NM southwest of Al Hudaydah, Yemen. A sailing vessel was approached by a skiff carrying 10–12 people, some armed. They attempted to board after the vessel refused to stop, but withdrew when a flare was deployed.
text_zh: UKMTO 报告称，在也门荷台达西南 54 海里处发生了一起事件。一艘帆船被一艘载有 10-12 人的小艇靠近，其中一些人携带武器。在船只拒绝停船后，他们试图登船，但在发射信号弹后撤退。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Iran’s government spokesperson Fatemeh Mohajerani said Tehran turned the enemy’s goal of “regime change” into a change of the “regime of Iran’s sovereignty over the Strait of Hormuz”, calling it one of the most important achievements of the nation’s 40 days of resistance. She added that Iran stood for 40 days, not four, forced the enemy to request a ceasefire, and emerged victorious from the battlefield. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 伊朗政府发言人法特梅·莫哈杰拉尼表示，德黑兰将敌人“政权更迭”的目标转变为“伊朗对霍尔木兹海峡主权政权”的更迭，称这是该国 40 天抵抗最重要的成就之一。她补充说，伊朗坚持了 40 天，而不是四天，迫使敌人请求停火，并从战场上取得了胜利。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 The Lebanese National News Agency reported fierce clashes the Israeli military and Hezbollah in the southern town of Bint Jbeil, earlier today. The IDF has encircled the town in recent days to clear it of alleged Hezbollah members. Israeli troops “are still trying to infiltrate and take control of the remaining neighbourhoods” in Bint Jbeil, while shelling the outskirts and entrances with artillery. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 黎巴嫩国家通讯社报道称，今天早些时候，以色列军队和真主党在南部城镇宾特朱拜勒发生了激烈冲突。以色列国防军最近几天包围了该镇，以清除所谓的真主党成员。以色列军队“仍在试图渗透并控制宾特朱拜勒的剩余街区”，同时用火炮轰炸郊区和入口。@wfwitness

text: ‼️ A security incident in the Red Sea.
text_zh: ‼️ 红海发生安全事件。

text: Iranian television has released footage reportedly from yesterday in the Strait of Hormuz region. The naval forces of the Iranian Revolutionary Guard warn a U.S. warship to stay away from the strait, change course, and turn back — otherwise, they will open fire.
text_zh: 伊朗电视台发布了据称是昨天在霍尔木兹海峡地区拍摄的画面。伊朗革命卫队海军警告一艘美国军舰远离海峡，改变航向并折返——否则，他们将开火。

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 Donald Trump: 📌 “Iran promised to open the Strait of Hormuz but failed to do so, causing anxiety, disruption, and harm to countries around the world.” 📌 “They claim to have placed mines in the water, even though much of their naval capability has been destroyed — but even the possibility is enough to deter shipowners.” 📌 “This has severely damaged Iran’s reputation, but we are beyond that now — they must immediately begin reopening this international waterway.” 📌 “Iran is unwilling to give up its nuclear ambitions.” 📌 “Iran will never have a nuclear weapon.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231：🇺🇸 唐纳德·特朗普：📌 “伊朗承诺开放霍尔木兹海峡但未能做到，导致世界各地的国家感到焦虑、混乱和受到伤害。” 📌 “他们声称在水中布设了水雷，尽管他们的大部分海军能力已被摧毁——但即使是这种可能性也足以威慑船东。” 📌 “这严重损害了伊朗的声誉，但我们现在已经超越了这一点——他们必须立即开始重新开放这条国际水道。” 📌 “伊朗不愿放弃其核野心。” 📌 “伊朗永远不会拥有核武器。” 与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel WATCH 🔴 Iran releases footage showing IRGC Navy ordering U.S. destroyers to turn away from the Strait of Hormuz, issuing a "last warning" before threatening to open fire. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043315207548600731/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 观看 🔴 伊朗发布画面，显示伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军命令美国驱逐舰远离霍尔木兹海峡，发出“最后警告”，随后威胁要开火。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043315207548600731/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel BREAKING 🔴 🔴 NAVEL BLOCKADE ON IRAN BEGINS SHORTLY Trump: “So, there you have it, the meeting went well, most points were agreed to, but the only point that really mattered, NUCLEAR, was not. Effective immediately, the United States Navy, the Finest in the World, will begin the process of BLOCKADING any and all Ships trying to enter, or leave, the Strait of Hormuz. At some point, we will reach an "ALL BEING ALLOWED TO GO IN, ALL BEING ALLOWED TO GO OUT" basis, but Iran has not allowed that to happen by merely saying, "There may be a mine out there somewhere," that nobody knows about but them. THIS IS WORLD EXTORTION, and Leaders of Countries, especially the United States of America, will never be extorted. I have also instructed our Navy to seek and interdict every vessel in International Waters that has paid a toll to Iran. No one who pays an illegal toll will have safe passage on the high seas. We will also begin destroying the mines the Iranians laid in the Straits. Any Iranian who fires at us, or at peaceful vessels, will be BLOWN TO HELL! Iran knows, better than anyone, how to END this situation which has already devastated their Country. Their Navy is gone, their Air Force is gone, their Anti Aircraft and Radar are useless, Khomeini, and most of their "Leaders," are dead, all because of their Nuclear ambition. The Blockade will begin shortly. Other Countries will be involved with this Blockade. Iran will not be allowed to profit off this Illegal Act of EXTORTION. They want money and, more importantly, they want Nuclear. Additionally and, at an appropriate moment, we are fully "LOCKED AND LOADED," and our Military will finish up the little that is left of Iran! President DONALD J. TRUMP” BREAKING 🔴 🔴 Trump: Our navy will now block any ship trying to enter or leave the Strait of Hormuz. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 突发 🔴 🔴 对伊朗的海军封锁即将开始 特朗普：“所以，就是这样，会议进行得很顺利，大多数点都达成了共识，但唯一真正重要的点，核，却没有。即刻生效，世界上最优秀的美利坚合众国海军将开始封锁任何和所有试图进入或离开霍尔木兹海峡的船只的过程。在某个时候，我们将达到‘全部允许进入，全部允许离开’的基础，但伊朗仅仅通过说‘某个地方可能有一个水雷’而没有让这种情况发生，除了他们之外没有人知道。这是世界勒索，国家领导人，特别是美利坚合众国，永远不会被勒索。我还指示我们的海军搜寻并拦截每一艘在国际水域向伊朗支付过通行费的船只。任何支付非法通行费的人都不会在公海上有安全通道。我们还将开始摧毁伊朗人在海峡布设的水雷。任何向我们或和平船只开火的伊朗人都将被炸成灰烬！伊朗比任何人都更清楚如何结束这种已经摧毁了他们国家的局势。他们的海军没了，空军没了，防空和雷达没用了，霍梅尼和他们的大多数‘领导人’都死了，这一切都是因为他们的核野心。封锁即将开始。其他国家将参与这次封锁。伊朗将不被允许从这种非法的勒索行为中获利。他们想要钱，更重要的是，他们想要核。此外，在适当的时候，我们已经完全‘锁定并装弹’，我们的军队将完成伊朗剩下的一点点！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统” 突发 🔴 🔴 特朗普：我们的海军现在将封锁任何试图进入或离开霍尔木兹海峡的船只。- 开源情报推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Trump orders the U.S. Navy to blockade the Strait of Hormuz to "any and all ships trying to enter, or leave." Also instructing the U.S. Navy to seek and interdict every vessel in international waters that has paid a toll to Iran: "No one who pays an illegal toll will have safe passage on the high seas." tweet

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Israeli military said it raided the Bint Jbeil Governmental Hospital in southern Lebanon where they alleged Hezbollah fighters had been holed up, killing approximately 20 Hezbollah fighters and their seizing weapons. Troops first allegedly identified Hezbollah activity at the hospital last week. After the Hezbollah fighters carried out surveillance and opened fire, IDF soldiers eliminated them and raided the medical centre, finding a alleged weapons cache. The IDF claimed Hezbollah systematically used the hospital for military purposes in severe violation of international law, despite prior warnings. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列军方表示，他们突袭了黎巴嫩南部的宾特朱拜勒政府医院，声称真主党武装人员躲藏在那里，打死了大约 20 名真主党武装人员并缴获了武器。部队上周首次声称在医院发现了真主党活动。在真主党武装人员进行监视并开火后，以色列国防军士兵消灭了他们并突袭了医疗中心，发现了所谓的武器库。以色列国防军声称，尽管有事先警告，真主党仍系统性地将医院用于军事目的，严重违反了国际法。@wfwitness

text: After failed US–Iran talks in Pakistan, JD Vance made a brief, unplanned stop at Ramstein Air Base while flying back to the US. Source: BILD
text_zh: 在美伊巴基斯坦会谈失败后，JD 万斯在飞回美国途中在拉姆施泰因空军基地进行了短暂的、计划外的停留。来源：BILD

text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国海军将开始封锁霍尔木兹海峡。🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 没读。很遗憾发生了这种事，或者我们为你感到高兴。🐻 如果有人有意志力和自恨来阅读这整篇舔窗宣言，你能否在评论中写出它的要点？谢谢。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The US Navy will start a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国海军将开始封锁霍尔木兹海峡。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 ⚡️ "I Feel Sorry for Him as I Do for All Slaves" -- Tucker Carlson slams Trump during BBC interview
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 ⚡️ “我为他感到难过，就像我为所有奴隶感到难过一样” —— 塔克·卡尔森在 BBC 采访中抨击特朗普

text: Trump: Iran promised to open the Strait of Hormuz, and they knowingly failed to do so. This caused anxiety, dislocation, and pain to many people and Countries throughout the World. They say they put mines in the water, even though all of their Navy, and most of their “mine droppers,” have been completely blown up. They may have done so, but what ship owner would want to take the chance? There is great dishonor and permanent harm to the reputation of Iran, and what’s left of their “Leaders,” but we are beyond all of that. As they promised, they better begin the process of getting this INTERNATIONAL WATERWAY OPEN AND FAST! Every Law in the book is being violated by them. IRAN IS UNWILLING TO GIVE UP ITS NUCLEAR AMBITIONS! IRAN WILL NEVER HAVE A NUCLEAR WEAPON!
text_zh: 特朗普：伊朗承诺开放霍尔木兹海峡，但他们故意食言。这给世界各地的许多人和国家带来了焦虑、混乱和痛苦。他们说他们在水中布设了水雷，尽管他们所有的海军和大多数“布雷器”都已被彻底炸毁。他们可能确实这样做了，但哪个船东愿意冒险？伊朗及其剩下的“领导人”名誉扫地，受到永久性伤害，但我们已经超越了这一切。正如他们所承诺的那样，他们最好开始让这条国际水道快速开放的过程！他们正在践踏书中的每一条法律。伊朗不愿放弃其核野心！伊朗永远不会拥有核武器！

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump announced that the United States Navy will immediately begin blockading any ships trying to enter or leave the Strait of Hormuz. He said the talks with Iran went well and most points were agreed, but the nuclear issue was…" Basically, Trump is now blockading the strait himself. Markets will be fun to watch.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普宣布，美国海军将立即开始封锁任何试图进入或离开霍尔木兹海峡的船只。他说与伊朗的会谈进行得很顺利，大多数点都达成了共识，但核问题……” 基本上，特朗普现在亲自封锁了海峡。市场将会很有看头。

text: BREAKING: Trump: So, there you have it, the meeting went well, most points were agreed to, but the only point that really mattered, NUCLEAR, was not. Effective immediately, the United States Navy, the Finest in the World, will begin the process of BLOCKADING any and all Ships trying to enter, or leave, the Strait of Hormuz. At some point, we will reach an “ALL BEING ALLOWED TO GO IN, ALL BEING ALLOWED TO GO OUT” basis, but Iran has not allowed that to happen by merely saying, “There may be a mine out there somewhere,” that nobody knows about but them. I have also instructed our Navy to seek and interdict every vessel in International Waters that has paid a toll to Iran. No one who pays an illegal toll will have safe passage on the high seas. We will also begin destroying the mines the Iranians laid in the Straits. Any Iranian who fires at us, or at peaceful vessels, will be BLOWN TO HELL! Iran knows, better than anyone, how to END this situation which has already devastated their Country. The Blockade will begin shortly. Other Countries will be involved with this Blockade. Iran will not be allowed to profit off this Illegal Act of EXTORTION. They want money and, more importantly, they want Nuclear. Additionally and, at an appropriate moment, we are fully “LOCKED AND LOADED,” and our Military will finish up the little that is left of Iran!
text_zh: 突发：特朗普：所以，就是这样，会议进行得很顺利，大多数点都达成了共识，但唯一真正重要的点，核，却没有。即刻生效，世界上最优秀的美利坚合众国海军将开始封锁任何和所有试图进入或离开霍尔木兹海峡的船只的过程。在某个时候，我们将达到“全部允许进入，全部允许离开”的基础，但伊朗仅仅通过说“某个地方可能有一个水雷”而没有让这种情况发生，除了他们之外没有人知道。我还指示我们的海军搜寻并拦截每一艘在国际水域向伊朗支付过通行费的船只。任何支付非法通行费的人都不会在公海上有安全通道。我们还将开始摧毁伊朗人在海峡布设的水雷。任何向我们或和平船只开火的伊朗人都将被炸成灰烬！伊朗比任何人都更清楚如何结束这种已经摧毁了他们国家的局势。封锁即将开始。其他国家将参与这次封锁。伊朗将不被允许从这种非法的勒索行为中获利。他们想要钱，更重要的是，他们想要核。此外，在适当的时候，我们已经完全“锁定并装弹”，我们的军队将完成伊朗剩下的一点点！
